title: Marked Rooted-Tree Summation for Polymer Cluster Expansions with Holes: A Lean 4 Formalization
description: Documentation-integrated publication artifact containing a Lean 4 companion, full scholarly article, theorem map, source provenance, and reproducibility tooling for target-preserving rooted-tree leaf summation in polymer cluster expansions with holes. Code and tooling are AGPL-3.0-or-later; original documentation and figures are CC BY 4.0.
